CStrings:
+ "\n%g  %g  %g"
+ "   %s\n"
+ "   %s:\n"
+ "  %zu allocated ROIs, %zu free fragments\n"
+ "  - ANE execution priority: PRIORITY_2\n"
+ "  - Created ANE memory provider for future sharing (provider: %p, program: %p)\n"
+ "  - Created new operation\n"
+ "  - Intermediate buffer allocation: enabled\n"
+ "  - Memory pool ID: %llu\n"
+ "  - Operation name: %@\n"
+ "  - Reused cached operation from slot %lu\n"
+ "  - Sharing ANE intermediate memory with existing provider (provider: %p, program: %p)\n"
+ "  Allocated: %zuKB (%zuMB), Fragmented: %zuKB (%zuMB) (%.1f%% fragmentation)\n"
+ "  Free Block %zu: offset=%zu, size=%zu (%zuKB)\n"
+ "  MaxUsedSize: %zuKB (%zuMB) (peak allocated excluding fragmentation)\n"
+ "  Total buffer size: %zu (%zuKB), %zu allocated ROIs\n"
+ " %zux%zu"
+ " [@%zuKB +%zuKB]"
+ " ]"
+ " b=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ " bind:%s"
+ " c=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ " d=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ " e=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ " f=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ " parents["
+ " peakNonVolatile=%ldKB"
+ " tileTime=%dms"
+ " {"
+ " {%d,%d}"
+ "%@%@_r%u"
+ "%@-%016llX"
+ "%@-%lu"
+ "%@_%@_%@"
+ "%@_r%u"
+ "%@|%@%@|autoreset:%d"
+ "%ca=%g b=%g c=%g d=%g e=%g f=%g"
+ "%ca=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ "%cargs=%0X"
+ "%cargsDigest=%0X"
+ "%ccache"
+ "%cgamma=%g"
+ "%cgamma=(%g,%g,%g)"
+ "%cinputFormat"
+ "%cnearestsampling"
+ "%coutputFormat"
+ "%llX(%04lX)"
+ "%llu"
+ "%p_%llu"
+ "%sLimit=%zuMB "
+ "%{public}s\n%{public}@"
+ "%{public}s A biplanar CIImageProcessorInput cannot be accessed via a Metal texture."
+ "%{public}s A biplanar CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via a Metal texture."
+ "%{public}s Cannot create a gainmap if the hdrImage is not a valid CIImage."
+ "%{public}s Creating CVPixelBuffer failed."
+ "%{public}s Creating IOSurfaceRef failed."
+ "%{public}s Creating IOSurfaceRef of pixel format 0 not supported."
+ "%{public}s Creating IOSurfaceRef of size (%zux%zu) not supported."
+ "%{public}s Creating IOSurfaceRef with nil identifier not supported."
+ "%{public}s Failed to create CMPhotoDecompressionSession: %d"
+ "%{public}s Failed to determine pixel format of CMPhoto container: (subsampling:%d, bitDepth:%d)"
+ "%{public}s Failed to get primary image index: %d"
+ "%{public}s The CIImageProcessorInput cannot be accessed via a Metal texture because the Core Image format %s is not valid for Metal."
+ "%{public}s The CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via a Metal texture because the Core Image format %s is not valid for Metal."
+ "%{public}s The CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via a Metal texture because the format %{public}s is not writable or renderable."
+ "%{public}s YCbCr container has depth of zero. Using 8 instead."
+ "%{public}s YCbCr container has subsampling of zero. Using 420 instead."
+ "%{public}s a CIImageProcessorInput with a empty region cannot be accessed via its base address."
+ "%{public}s a Metal-only CIImageProcessorInput cannot be accessed via an IOSurface."
+ "%{public}s a Metal-only CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via an IOSurface."
+ "%{public}s a Metal-only CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via its base address."
+ "%{public}s a biplanar CIImageProcessorInput cannot be accessed via its base address."
+ "%{public}s a biplanar CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via its base address."
+ "%{public}s a compressed CIImageProcessorInput cannot be accessed via its base address."
+ "%{public}s a compressed CIImageProcessorOutput cannot be accessed via its base address."
+ "%{public}s each object in arguments dictionary must be an NSArray, NSDictionary, NSNumber, NSValue, NSData, NSString, NSNull, CIVector, CIColor, CIKernel, CIImage, CGImageRef, or CGColorSpaceRef for CoreImage to cache optimally (%{public}@)."
+ "%{public}s failed for NSDictionary object because it contains keys that are not NSStrings."
+ "%{public}s is deprecated. Add __attribute__((preserves_opacity)) to the CIKL source for '%s' instead."
+ "%{public}s tileWidth and tileHeight must be greater than 0"
+ "%{public}s unsupported MTLPixelFormat %{public}s."
+ "(%s"
+ "(%s)"
+ "+[CIImageProcessorKernel applyWithExtent:inputs:arguments:tileRects:error:]"
+ ",%s"
+ "-[CIContext(ImageRepresentationPrivate) gainMapImageForSDR:HDR:colorSpace:rgbGainmap:]"
+ "-[CIImage imageByInsertingTiledIntermediateWithTileSize::]"
+ "-[CIImageProcessorOutput _retainSurfaceFromCacheOfFormat:width:height:identifier:]"
+ "-[CIImageProcessorOutput retainSurfaceFromCacheOfFormat:width:height:]"
+ "-[CIImageProcessorOutput temporaryPixelBufferWithIdentifier:format:width:height:attributes:]"
+ "// Uber DAG Functions: %s (uber_num_regs=%u)\n"
+ "1653.0.0.120.2"
+ "27"
+ "<CIMLFeatureProvider: %p>\n"
+ "={%d}"
+ "@\"IOSurface\"44@?0@\"NSString\"8{?=QQQ}16B40"
+ "A10"
+ "A12"
+ "ANE"
+ "Applied shared event wait for child node %u: event=%p value=%llu"
+ "B12@?0S8"
+ "B16@?0S8B12"
+ "Binary archive '%{public}@' not found in bundle (not built for this platform)\n"
+ "CFStringRef getkCMPhotoAuxiliaryImageTypeURN_Depth()"
+ "CFStringRef getkCMPhotoAuxiliaryImageTypeURN_MIAF_Depth()"
+ "CFStringRef getkCMPhotoAuxiliaryImageTypeURN_PortraitEffectsMatte()"

+ "float __selectFFF(float a, float b, float c) {\n  return bool(c) ? b : a;\n}\nvec4 __select(vec4 a, vec4 b, vec4 c) {\n  vec4 r;\n  r.x = __selectFFF(a.x, b.x, c.x);\n  r.y = __selectFFF(a.y, b.y, c.y);\n  r.z = __selectFFF(a.z, b.z, c.z);\n  r.w = __selectFFF(a.w, b.w, c.w);\n  return r;\n}\nvec4 _computeFaceMaskParams(vec4 facesLeftEyeX, vec4 facesLeftEyeY, vec4 facesCentreX, vec4 facesCentreY, vec4 facesRightEyeX, vec4 facesRightEyeY, vec4 leftEyeBlur, vec4 rightEyeBlur, vec4 chinX, vec4 chinY, vec4 param1, vec4 param2, vec4 param3, vec4 param4, vec2 dc, vec4 facesValid) {\n  float maxBlur = param1.x;\n  float facesCapMultip = param1.y;\n  float facesMaxBlurOnEyes = param1.z;\n  float facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus = param1.w;\n  float facesLinearBlurGrowthM = param2.x;\n  float facesLinearBlurGrowthC = param2.y;\n  float facesEyeToEyebrowRatio = param2.z;\n  float facesDistToBlurScaling = param2.w;\n  float facesGainMultip = param3.x;\n  float imageAspectRatio = param3.y;\n  float chinVectorSnapping = param4.x;\n  float apertureScaling = param4.y;\n  leftEyeBlur = compare(facesValid, vec4(1.0), (leftEyeBlur * leftEyeBlur) * maxBlur);\n  rightEyeBlur = compare(facesValid, vec4(1.0), (rightEyeBlur * rightEyeBlur) * maxBlur);\n  vec4 minBlurForEyes = min(leftEyeBlur, rightEyeBlur);\n  float overallMinBlur = min(min(minBlurForEyes.x, minBlurForEyes.y), min(minBlurForEyes.z, minBlurForEyes.w));\n  bool anyFaceValid = overallMinBlur < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurOnEyes);\n  vec4 faceValid;\n  faceValid.x = float((minBlurForEyes.x - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  faceValid.y = float((minBlurForEyes.y - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  faceValid.z = float((minBlurForEyes.z - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  faceValid.w = float((minBlurForEyes.w - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  if (bool(facesValid.x) && bool(faceValid.x)) facesValid.x = 1.0;\n  if (bool(facesValid.y) && bool(faceValid.y)) facesValid.y = 1.0;\n  if (bool(facesValid.z) && bool(faceValid.z)) facesValid.z = 1.0;\n  if (bool(facesValid.w) && bool(faceValid.w)) faceValid.w = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.x)) facesValid.x = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.y)) facesValid.y = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.z)) facesValid.z = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.w)) facesValid.w = 1.0;\n  vec4 leftEyeDistanceX = facesLeftEyeX - facesCentreX;\n  vec4 leftEyeDistanceY = imageAspectRatio * (facesLeftEyeY - facesCentreY);\n  vec4 rightEyeDistanceX = facesRightEyeX - facesCentreX;\n  vec4 rightEyeDistanceY = imageAspectRatio * (facesRightEyeY - facesCentreY);\n  vec4 leftEyeDistance = sqrt((leftEyeDistanceX * leftEyeDistanceX) + (leftEyeDistanceY * leftEyeDistanceY));\n  vec4 rightEyeDistance = sqrt((rightEyeDistanceX * rightEyeDistanceX) + (rightEyeDistanceY * rightEyeDistanceY));\n  vec4 faceRadius = max(leftEyeDistance, rightEyeDistance) * facesEyeToEyebrowRatio;\n  vec4 chinDeltaX = chinX - facesCentreX;\n  vec4 chinDeltaY = imageAspectRatio * (chinY - facesCentreY);\n  vec4 chinDeltaNorm0 = max(abs(chinDeltaX), abs(chinDeltaY));\n  vec4 chinDeltaNorm2 = sqrt((chinDeltaX * chinDeltaX) + (chinDeltaY * chinDeltaY));\n  vec4 chinDeltaNormR = chinDeltaNorm0 / max(chinDeltaNorm2, 1.000000e-10);\n  vec4 chinVectorInhibition = 1.0 - clamp(chinVectorSnapping * (1.0 - (3.4142 * (chinDeltaNormR - 7.071100e-01))), 0.0, 1.0);\n  vec4 maxBlurToAdd = __select(vec4(1.0), chinVectorInhibition * ((facesLinearBlurGrowthM * faceRadius) + facesLinearBlurGrowthC), facesValid);\n  vec4 blur2AddOnLeftEye = min(maxBlurToAdd, (faceRadius * facesDistToBlurScaling) * (leftEyeDistance - + "kernel vec4 _raw_fringedirections_filterDisplacements(sampler disp) {\n  vec2 pt = destCoord();\n  vec2 s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9, m;\n  vec2 e1, e2, e3, e4, e5, e6, e7, e8, e9, e10, e11, e12, e13, e14, e15, e16, e17, e18, e19, e20, e21, e22, e23, e24, e25, e26, e27, e28, e29;\n  vec4 orig;\n  orig = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(0.0, 0.0)));\n  s1 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(-1.0, 1.0))).xy;\n  s2 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(0.0, 1.0))).xy;\n  s3 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(1.0, 1.0))).xy;\n  s4 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(-1.0, 0.0))).xy;\n  s5 = orig.xy;\n  s6 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(1.0, 0.0))).xy;\n  s7 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(-1.0, -1.0))).xy;\n  s8 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(0.0, -1.0))).xy;\n  s9 = sample(disp, samplerTransform(disp, pt + vec2(1.0, -1.0))).xy;\n  e1 = min(s2, s3);\n  e2 = max(s2, s3);\n  e3 = min(s5, s6);\n  e4 = max(s5, s6);\n  e5 = min(s8, s9);\n  e6 = max(s8, s9);\n  e7 = min(s1, e1);\n  e8 = max(s1, e1);\n  e9 = min(s4, e3);\n  e10 = max(s4, e3);\n  e11 = min(s7, e5);\n  e12 = max(s7, e5);\n  e13 = min(e8, e2);\n  e14 = max(e8, e2);\n  e15 = min(e10, e4);\n  e16 = max(e10, e4);\n  e17 = min(e12, e6);\n  e18 = max(e12, e6);\n  e19 = max(e7, e9);\n  e20 = min(e16, e18);\n  e21 = max(e19, e11);\n  e22 = min(e14, e20);\n  e23 = min(e15, e17);\n  e24 = max(e15, e17);\n  e25 = max(e13, e23);\n  e26 = min(e24, e25);\n  e27 = min(e26, e22);\n  e28 = max(e26, e22);\n  e29 = max(e21, e27);\n  m = min(e29, e28);\n  return vec4(m, orig.z, 1.0);\n}\n"

overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  faceValid.y = float((minBlurForEyes.y - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  faceValid.z = float((minBlurForEyes.z - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  faceValid.w = float((minBlurForEyes.w - overallMinBlur) < (apertureScaling * facesMaxBlurDistFromFocus));\n  if (bool(facesValid.x) && bool(faceValid.x)) facesValid.x = 1.0;\n  if (bool(facesValid.y) && bool(faceValid.y)) facesValid.y = 1.0;\n  if (bool(facesValid.z) && bool(faceValid.z)) facesValid.z = 1.0;\n  if (bool(facesValid.w) && bool(faceValid.w)) faceValid.w = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.x)) facesValid.x = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.y)) facesValid.y = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.z)) facesValid.z = 1.0;\n  if (anyFaceValid && bool(facesValid.w)) facesValid.w = 1.0;\n  vec4 leftEyeDistanceX = facesLeftEyeX - facesCentreX;\n  vec4 leftEyeDistanceY = imageAspectRatio * (facesLeftEyeY - facesCentreY);\n  vec4 rightEyeDistanceX = facesRightEyeX - facesCentreX;\n  vec4 rightEyeDistanceY = imageAspectRatio * (facesRightEyeY - facesCentreY);\n  vec4 leftEyeDistance = sqrt((leftEyeDistanceX * leftEyeDistanceX) + (leftEyeDistanceY * leftEyeDistanceY));\n  vec4 rightEyeDistance = sqrt((rightEyeDistanceX * rightEyeDistanceX) + (rightEyeDistanceY * rightEyeDistanceY));\n  vec4 faceRadius = max(leftEyeDistance, rightEyeDistance) * facesEyeToEyebrowRatio;\n  vec4 chinDeltaX = chinX - facesCentreX;\n  vec4 chinDeltaY = imageAspectRatio * (chinY - facesCentreY);\n  vec4 chinDeltaNorm0 = max(abs(chinDeltaX), abs(chinDeltaY));\n  vec4 chinDeltaNorm2 = sqrt((chinDeltaX * chinDeltaX) + (chinDeltaY * chinDeltaY));\n  vec4 chinDeltaNormR = chinDeltaNorm0 / max(chinDeltaNorm2, 1.000000e-10);\n  vec4 chinVectorInhibition = 1.0 - clamp(chinVectorSnapping * (1.0 - (3.4142 * (chinDeltaNormR - 7.071100e-01))), 0.0, 1.0);\n  vec4 maxBlurToAdd = compare(facesValid, vec4(1.0), chinVectorInhibition * ((facesLinearBlurGrowthM * faceRadius) + facesLinearBlurGrowthC));\n  maxBlurToAdd = __select(vec4(1.0), chinVectorInhibition * ((facesLinearBlurGrowthM * faceRadius) + facesLinearBlurGrowthC), facesValid);\n  vec4 blur2AddOnLeftEye = min(maxBlurToAdd, (faceRadius * facesDistToBlurScaling) * (leftEyeDistance - faceRadius));\n  vec4 blur2AddOnRightEye = min(maxBlurToAdd, (faceRadius * facesDistToBlurScaling) * (rightEyeDistance - faceRadius));\n  vec4 multip = min(vec4(facesCapMultip), max(abs(leftEyeBlur / blur2AddOnLeftEye), abs(rightEyeBlur / blur2AddOnRightEye)));\n  vec4 facesKM = ((apertureScaling * chinVectorInhibition) * faceRadius) * facesDistToBlurScaling;\n  vec4 facesK0 = ((facesKM * facesGainMultip) * facesGainMultip) * multip;\n  vec4 facesK1 = (-faceRadius) * facesK0;\n  vec4 facesK2 = facesKM - facesK0;\n  vec4 facesK3 = faceRadius;\n  float facesK4 = apertureScaling * min(min(maxBlurToAdd.x, maxBlurToAdd.y), min(maxBlurToAdd.z, maxBlurToAdd.w));\n  if (dc.x < 1.0) return __select(vec4(0.0), facesK0 / maxBlur, facesValid); else if (dc.x < 2.0) return __select(vec4(1.0), facesK1 / maxBlur, facesValid); else if (dc.x < 3.0) return __select(vec4(0.0), facesK2 / maxBlur, facesValid); else if (dc.x < 4.0) return compare(facesValid, vec4(0.0), facesK3);\n  return vec4(anyFaceValid ? (facesK4 / maxBlur) : 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);\n}\nkernel vec4 _faceMaskCalculator(sampler image, vec4 lex, vec4 ley, vec4 cx, vec4 cy, vec4 rex, vec4 rey, vec4 chinx, vec4 chiny, vec4 param1, vec4 param2, vec4 param3, vec4 param4, vec4 facesValid) {\n  vec4 leftEyeBlur, rightEyeBlur;\n  vec2 imageSize = param3.zw;\n  leftEyeBlur.x = (facesValid.x > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(lex.x, ley.x))).x : 1.0;\n  leftEyeBlur.y = (facesValid.y > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(lex.y, ley.y))).x : 1.0;\n  leftEyeBlur.z = (facesValid.z > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(lex.z, ley.z))).x : 1.0;\n  leftEyeBlur.w = (facesValid.w > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(lex.w, ley.w))).x : 1.0;\n  rightEyeBlur.x = (facesValid.x > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(rex.x, rey.x))).x : 1.0;\n  rightEyeBlur.y = (facesValid.y > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(rex.y, rey.y))).x : 1.0;\n  rightEyeBlur.z = (facesValid.z > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(rex.z, rey.z))).x : 1.0;\n  rightEyeBlur.w = (facesValid.w > 0.0) ? sample(image, samplerTransform(image, vec2(rex.w, rey.w))).x : 1.0;\n  return _computeFaceMaskParams(lex / imageSize.x, ley / imageSize.y, cx / imageSize.x, cy / imageSize.y, rex / imageSize.x, rey / imageSize.y, leftEyeBlur, rightEyeBlur, chinx / imageSize.x, chiny / imageSize.y, param1, param2, param3, param4, destCoord(), facesValid);\n}\n"
- "float _saturate(float a) {\n  return max(0.0, min(1.0, a));\n}\nfloat _computeSmoothedFWidthCommon(sampler s, vec2 dc, float scale, int channel) {\n  vec2 base_coord = samplerTransform(s, dc);\n  vec2 delta_x = samplerTransform(s, dc + vec2(1.0, 0.0)) - base_coord;\n  vec2 delta_y = samplerTransform(s, dc + vec2(0.0, 1.0)) - base_coord;\n  vec4 left = sample(s, base_coord - delta_x);\n  vec4 right = sample(s, base_coord + delta_x);\n  vec4 down = sample(s, base_coord - delta_y);\n  vec4 up = sample(s, base_coord + delta_y);\n  float dfdx = (0.5 * scale) * (right[channel] - left[channel]);\n  float dfdy = (0.5 * scale) * (up[channel] - down[channel]);\n  float fwidth = abs(dfdx) + abs(dfdy);\n  return (1.0 / 1.200) * clamp(fwidth, 1e-4, 2.0);\n}\nfloat _computeSmoothedFWidthTransformed(sampler s, vec2 dc, float scale) {\n  return _computeSmoothedFWidthCommon(s, dc, scale, 0);\n}\nkernel vec4 _glassHighlight(sampler s, vec4 values0, vec4 values1, float sdfZero, vec4 color) {\n  vec2 dc = destCoord();\n  vec3 sdf = sample(s, samplerCoord(s)).xyz;\n  float height = values0.x;\n  float inset = values0.y;\n  float spread = values0.z;\n  float bias_amount = values0.w;\n  float curvature = values1.x;\n  vec2 light_dir = values1.yz;\n  float sdfScale = values1.w;\n  float distance = ((-(sdf.r - sdfZero)) * sdfScale) - inset;\n  vec2 gradient = -((sdf.gb * 2.0) - 1.0);\n  float d_norm = _saturate(distance / height);\n  float h = mix(1.0, 1.0 - d_norm, curvature);\n  float w = _computeSmoothedFWidthTransformed(s, dc, sdfScale);\n  float mask = _saturate(0.5 + ((height - distance) / w));\n  mask *= _saturate(0.5 + (distance / w));\n  float alpha = _saturate((dot(light_dir, gradient) - spread) / max(1.0 - float(spread), 1e-4));\n  alpha = alpha / max((bias_amount * (1.0 - alpha)) + 1.0, 1e-4);\n  color *= (mask * alpha) * h;\n  return color;\n}\n"
- "float _saturate(float a) {\n  return max(0.0, min(1.0, a));\n}\nfloat _computeSmoothedFWidthCommon(sampler s, vec2 dc, float scale, int channel) {\n  vec2 base_coord = samplerTransform(s, dc);\n  vec2 delta_x = samplerTransform(s, dc + vec2(1.0, 0.0)) - base_coord;\n  vec2 delta_y = samplerTransform(s, dc + vec2(0.0, 1.0)) - base_coord;\n  vec4 left = sample(s, base_coord - delta_x);\n  vec4 right = sample(s, base_coord + delta_x);\n  vec4 down = sample(s, base_coord - delta_y);\n  vec4 up = sample(s, base_coord + delta_y);\n  float dfdx = (0.5 * scale) * (right[channel] - left[channel]);\n  float dfdy = (0.5 * scale) * (up[channel] - down[channel]);\n  float fwidth = abs(dfdx) + abs(dfdy);\n  return (1.0 / 1.200) * clamp(fwidth, 1e-4, 2.0);\n}\nkernel vec4 _glassHighlightFromAlpha(sampler s, vec4 values0, vec4 values1, float sdfZero, vec4 color, vec2 center) {\n  vec2 dc = destCoord();\n  vec4 sample_val = sample(s, samplerCoord(s));\n  float height = values0.x;\n  float inset = values0.y;\n  float spread = values0.z;\n  float bias_amount = values0.w;\n  float curvature = values1.x;\n  vec2 light_dir = values1.yz;\n  float sdfScale = values1.w;\n  float distance = ((sample_val.w - sdfZero) * sdfScale) - inset;\n  float d_norm = _saturate(distance / height);\n  float h = mix(1.0, 1.0 - d_norm, curvature);\n  vec2 normal = normalize(dc - center);\n  bool fullBleed = inset == 0.0;\n  float w = _computeSmoothedFWidthCommon(s, dc, sdfScale, 3);\n  float mask = _saturate(0.5 + ((height - distance) / w));\n  if (!fullBleed) {\n    mask *= _saturate(0.5 + (distance / w));\n  }\n  float alpha = _saturate((dot(light_dir, normal) - spread) / max(1.0 - float(spread), 1e-4));\n  alpha = alpha / max(float((bias_amount * (1.0 - alpha)) + 1.0), 1e-4);\n  color *= (mask * alpha) * h;\n  return color;\n}\n"
- "float _step_function(float edge, float x) {\n  return (x < edge) ? 0.0 : 1.0;\n}\nvec2 _saturate2(vec2 a) {\n  return max(vec2(0.0), min(vec2(1.0), a));\n}\nkernel vec4 _fallbackComputeNormals(vec4 s, vec4 dfDxdfDyX) {\n  float dist = s.x;\n  vec2 gradient = vec2(-dfDxdfDyX.x, dfDxdfDyX.y);\n  float size = length(gradient);\n  vec2 grad_norm = (_step_function(size, 1e-4) * gradient) / size;\n  vec4 combined = vec4(dist, _saturate2((grad_norm * vec2(0.5)) + vec2(0.5)), 1.0);\n  return combined;\n}\n"

- "kernel"
- "kernel vec4 _appleLogToLinear(vec4 P) {\n  const float R0 = -5.641088e-02;\n  const float Rt = 0.01;\n  const float c = 4.728711e+01;\n  const float beta = 9.640520e-03;\n  const float gamma = 8.550479e-02;\n  const float delta = 6.933694e-01;\n  const float Pt = (c * (Rt - R0)) * (Rt - R0);\n  vec4 Ra;\n  vec4 Rb = sqrt(P / c) + R0;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _blurredroundedrect(vec4 bounds, float radius, vec2 softness, float sigma, vec4 color) {\n  vec2 lo = bounds.xy;\n  vec2 hi = bounds.zw;\n  sigma *= 2.400;\n  radius = max(radius, sigma * 0.5);\n  vec2 dc = destCoord();\n  vec2 p = dc;\n  float R = radius;\n  vec2 Rs = softness;\n  vec2 cl = (lo + R) + (R * Rs);\n  vec2 ch = (hi - R) - (R * Rs);\n  vec2 k = max((4.0 * R) * Rs, 1e-6);\n  vec2 xl = cl - (0.5 * k);\n  vec2 xh = ch + (0.5 * k);\n  p = compare(p - xl, p - (lo + R), compare(p - cl, ((-(p - cl)) * (p - cl)) / k, compare(p - ch, vec2(0.0), compare(p - xh, ((p - ch) * (p - ch)) / k, p - (hi - R)))));\n  float x = length(p) - R;\n  if (x < ((-9.900000e-01) * R)) {\n    vec2 lo = bounds.xy + R;\n    vec2 hi = bounds.zw - R;\n    x = max(max(lo.x - dc.x, lo.y - dc.y), max(dc.x - hi.x, dc.y - hi.y));\n    x -= R;\n  }\n  x = clamp((x + sigma) / (2.0 * sigma), 0.0, 1.0);\n  x = ((x * x) * x) * ((((6.0 * x) - 1.500000e+01) * x) + 10.0);\n  return color * (1.0 - x);\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _boxFilter3(sampler a) {\n  vec2 dc = destCoord();\n  vec4 v0 = sample(a, samplerTransform(a, dc + vec2(-0.5, +0.5))) * (4.0 / 9.0);\n  vec4 v1 = sample(a, samplerTransform(a, dc + vec2(1.0, 0.5))) * (2.0 / 9.0);\n  vec4 v2 = sample(a, samplerTransform(a, dc + vec2(-0.5, -1.0))) * (2.0 / 9.0);\n  vec4 v3 = sample(a, samplerTransform(a, dc + vec2(1.0, -1.0))) * (1.0 / 9.0);\n  return ((v0 + v1) + v2) + v3;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _ci_to_a2bgr10_as_rgba8(vec4 s) {\n  vec4 denorm = (clamp(s, vec4(0.0), vec4(1.0)) * vec4(vec3(1023.0), 3.0)) + 0.5;\n  int pixel = int(denorm.r);\n  pixel |= int(denorm.g) << 10;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.b) << 20;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.a) << 30;\n  return vec4(pixel & 255, (pixel >> 8) & 255, (pixel >> 16) & 255, (pixel >> 24) & 255) / 255.0;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _ci_to_a2rgb10_as_rgba8(vec4 s) {\n  vec4 denorm = (clamp(s, vec4(0.0), vec4(1.0)) * vec4(vec3(1023.0), 3.0)) + 0.5;\n  int pixel = int(denorm.b);\n  pixel |= int(denorm.g) << 10;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.r) << 20;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.a) << 30;\n  return vec4(pixel & 255, (pixel >> 8) & 255, (pixel >> 16) & 255, (pixel >> 24) & 255) / 255.0;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _ci_to_rgb10_as_rgba8(vec4 s) {\n  vec4 denorm = (clamp(s, vec4(0.0), vec4(1.0)) * vec4(vec3(1023.0), 3.0)) + 0.5;\n  int pixel = int(denorm.b);\n  pixel |= int(denorm.g) << 10;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.r) << 20;\n  pixel |= 3 << 30;\n  return vec4(pixel & 255, (pixel >> 8) & 255, (pixel >> 16) & 255, (pixel >> 24) & 255) / 255.0;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _ci_to_rgb10wide_as_rgba8(vec4 s) {\n  s = vec4((linear_to_srgb(s.rgb) * (510.0 / 1023.0)) + (384.0 / 1023.0), 1.0);\n  vec4 denorm = (clamp(s, vec4(0.0), vec4(1.0)) * vec4(vec3(1023.0), 3.0)) + 0.5;\n  int pixel = int(denorm.b);\n  pixel |= int(denorm.g) << 10;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.r) << 20;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.a) << 30;\n  return vec4(pixel & 255, (pixel >> 8) & 255, (pixel >> 16) & 255, (pixel >> 24) & 255) / 255.0;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _ci_to_rgb10widelinear_as_rgba8(vec4 s) {\n  s = vec4((s.rgb * (510.0 / 1023.0)) + (384.0 / 1023.0), 1.0);\n  vec4 denorm = (clamp(s, vec4(0.0), vec4(1.0)) * vec4(vec3(1023.0), 3.0)) + 0.5;\n  int pixel = int(denorm.b);\n  pixel |= int(denorm.g) << 10;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.r) << 20;\n  pixel |= int(denorm.a) << 30;\n  return vec4(pixel & 255, (pixel >> 8) & 255, (pixel >> 16) & 255, (pixel >> 24) & 255) / 255.0;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _ci_ycc_to_rgb(vec4 s) {\n  return s.zxyw;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _finalResult(vec4 ab, vec4 I) {\n  float v = dot(ab.rgb, I.rgb) + ab.w;\n  return vec4(v, v, v, 1.0);\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _gainMap(vec4 src, vec4 gm, float amt) {\n  src.rgb *= 1.0 + ((amt - 1.0) * gm.r);\n  return src;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _hlg_srmapping(vec4 im, vec4 lc, vec2 gg) {\n  float gamma = gg.x;\n  float gain = gg.y;\n  vec4 rgbm_lg = im;\n  rgbm_lg.rgb *= gain;\n  rgbm_lg.a = max(max(rgbm_lg.r, rgbm_lg.g), rgbm_lg.b);\n  float Y_lg = dot(rgbm_lg, lc);\n  vec4 rgbm_sb = rgbm_lg;\n  rgbm_sb = pow(rgbm_lg, vec4(gamma));\n  float Y_sb = dot(rgbm_sb, lc);\n  float tone_adjust = (Y_sb != 0.0) ? (Y_lg / Y_sb) : 1.0;\n  vec4 result = rgbm_sb * tone_adjust;\n  result.a = im.a;\n  return result;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _linearToAppleLog(vec4 R) {\n  const float R0 = -5.641088e-02;\n  const float Rt = 0.01;\n  const float c = 4.728711e+01;\n  const float beta = 9.640520e-03;\n  const float gamma = 8.550479e-02;\n  const float delta = 6.933694e-01;\n  vec4 Pa = (gamma * log2(R + beta)) + delta;\n  vec4 Pb = (c * (R - R0)) * (R - R0);\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _multiplyImages(vec4 a, vec4 b) {\n  return a * b;\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _swizzleXXX1(vec4 a) {\n  return vec4(a.xxx, 1.0);\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _swizzleYYZ1(vec4 a) {\n  return vec4(a.yyz, 1.0);\n}\n"
- "kernel vec4 _swizzleYZZ1(vec4 a) {\n  return vec4(a.yzz, 1.0);\n}\n"
